use_cases: User authentication dialogs with password visibility toggle
Confirmation and alert modals for critical actions
Form submissions displayed within modal overlays
Settings panels and preference management interfaces
Content reveal dialogs with customizable button actions
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based dialog modal component featuring customizable button variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) with multiple size options. Includes form accessibility features like labels, aria-invalid states, and password visibility toggle functionality. Built with Tailwind CSS and follows flat/minimalist design patterns suitable for SaaS applications and authentication flows.
